error.loadFailed: Could not load OTA Optimizer data. Refresh the page.
error.minOneOta: Select at least one OTA to keep active.
error.saveStatusFailed: Could not save status. Try again.

confirm.resetAll: Reset ALL OTA Optimizer state for every OTA? This deletes all status history for this hotel.
confirm.resetOta: Reset all OTA Optimizer state for {{ota}}? This deletes status history for this OTA only.

activeOtas.label: Active OTAs
activeOtas.desc: Which OTAs do you currently list on? Inactive ones are excluded from scoring.

mountain.label: Mountain property disclosures
mountain.desc: Adds 13 extra checks for steep roads, snow, heating, etc. Auto-derived from state — override if your property doesn't match.

matrix.title: Compare across OTAs
matrix.subtitle: Click any cell to set statuses for that category × OTA. Empty cells = items don't apply to that OTA.

wizard.title: OTA Listing Optimizer — first-time setup
wizard.subtitle: About 15 minutes. You can skip and resume anytime.

step1.title: Which OTAs do you list on?
step1.desc: Toggle off the OTAs you don't use. You can change this later.

step2.title: Mountain property disclosures?
step2.desc: Adds 13 extra checks for parking, steep roads, snow, heating, hot water, etc. — important for mountain properties.

step3.title: Quick first-pass (optional)
step3.desc: Mark the most important items per OTA. You can skip and come back to fill more.
step3.blankNote: Items left blank stay as "Not reviewed" — set them later from the workspace.

step4.title: All set
step4.desc: Continue in the workspace. You can re-run this setup anytime.
